narrative:
Swanton Swancreek (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,244 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
